result.text: {"answer_label":"brigade-schema","answer":"Use a Brigade-owned versioned schema for shared code-reference evidence. Brigade already composes code intelligence with evidence memory, and consolidation removes competing lifecycle owners while retaining GraphTrail and MiseLedger as separate processes.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"Keep engine process boundaries separate and preserve existing receipt and JSON contracts through compatibility tests or a reviewed migration.","evidence":["EVIDENCE.md states that consolidation moves shared receipt, graph-reference, and evidence contracts under Brigade.","src/brigade/evidence_cmd.py documents that MiseLedger performs exact code-reference matching before lexical fallback; the named test asserts verbatim forwarding of --code-reference."]}
